entries.title: The Wild Robot
entries.why: Emotionally restorative. Parenting themes. Beautiful visuals. Low cognitive load.

entries.title: Soul
entries.why: Meaning, purpose, what makes a life. Safe for any state.

entries.title: Sing Sing
entries.why: Redemption arc. Forgiveness. Real story. Cognitively engaging.

entries.title: CODA
entries.why: Family, belonging, identity. Emotionally full but not heavy.

entries.title: The Intouchables
entries.why: Joy, friendship, unexpected connection. Lifts any state.

entries.title: The Book of Why — Pearl
entries.why: Causal inference. Strategic hill. Best read when cognitively fresh.

entries.title: The Feeling of What Happens — Damasio
entries.why: SOMA's theoretical foundation. Dense but rewarding. Needs focus.

entries.title: Causality — Pearl
entries.why: Deep technical. Save for peak cognitive windows only.

entries.title: Morning run
entries.why: Keystone habit. Restores HRV within 90 min. Replaces cannabis dopamine.

entries.title: Kettlebell session
entries.why: Midday reset. 18lb current. Reliably improves post-session HRV.

entries.title: Tonglen meditation
entries.why: Compassion practice. Nervous system regulation. Core identity.

entries.title: Vibe coding session — SOMA
entries.why: Flow state. Creative peak usage. Best when HRV is high.

entries.title: Write to River
entries.why: Meaning. Legacy. Connects to the deepest why. Any state.

entries.title: Daddit co-writing session
entries.why: Tonglen in practice. Compassion externalized. Restorative.

entries.title: Play with River
entries.why: Pure presence. Joy baseline. What does HRV look like here?

entries.title: Hacker News — 15 min
entries.why: Curated tech signal. Natural ceiling scroll. Get in, get out.

entries.title: Heather Cox Richardson — Letters from an American
entries.why: Informed awareness without outrage loop. Weekly or as needed.
